name: xmtp-signet
description: Skills for using and administering the xmtp-signet. Covers the v1 credential model, the `xs` CLI surface, and the harness protocol.

interface.longDescription: Two skills that teach agents and orchestrators how to work with the xmtp-signet: `xmtp` for day-to-day use (messaging, reading, harness connection) and `xmtp-admin` for orchestrator-side setup (operators, credentials, policies, keys, wallets, seals).
